This plant is a type of succulent, adapted to survive in dry environments with limited water availability. The classification of Placus purpurascens is further grouped into the order Gentianales, making it a part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms. Overall, its classification reflects its unique characteristics as a succulent plant in the tropical region of Madagascar.
